description: AI systems are moving from chat-only interfaces to agents that can use tools, edit files, browse, test, and complete workflows.
The best AI products increasingly combine language, images, video, audio, and code in one interface.
Smaller models make private, low-latency AI possible on local devices and company infrastructure.
Prompt injection, data leakage, model abuse, and unsafe automation require strong security design.
Teams need repeatable testing, monitoring, versioning, and cost controls for AI systems.
